title: Alien life in the NGE universe
display_title: Alien life in the NGE universe
wikitext:
[]: Alien life in the NGE universe             Quote Post by Gretnablue. » Fri Sep 20, 2013 4:11 pm In the Evangelion expanded universe, there was a race of beings called the first ancestral race who when they realized that there race was doomed, created seven seeds of life and launched them across the galaxy (presumably by a FAR that looked like Marlon Brando or Russell Crowe in the Rebuild series). Two of these landed on earth by accident, one of the fruit of life and one of the fruit of knowledge, but to my knowledge, we never find out what happened to the other five seeds of life. If we assume all had went to plan with these ones, how do you think these worlds be similar or different if they were Angel based life forms? How would these alien races react to the situation on earth (SI, EVAs etc?) Would they help or mock us from a far? Would the other Angel life forms act the same as the ones on earth, or would they be less aggressive to us? [/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 20, 2013 4:30 pm Thats basically just a great big shrug. We don't have any way of knowing what sort of life these others would create or what kind of fruits they bear... possibly 5 completely new types we can't even begin to speculate about. Also keep in mind that's info only revealed in one of the games, so it's canonicity is debatable.

Article: Alien life in the NGE universe
[]: Alien life in the NGE universe             Quote Post by Gretnablue. » Fri Sep 20, 2013 4:11 pm In the Evangelion expanded universe, there was a race of beings called the first ancestral race who when they realized that there race was doomed, created seven seeds of life and launched them across the galaxy (presumably by a FAR that looked like Marlon Brando or Russell Crowe in the Rebuild series). Two of these landed on earth by accident, one of the fruit of life and one of the fruit of knowledge, but to my knowledge, we never find out what happened to the other five seeds of life. If we assume all had went to plan with these ones, how do you think these worlds be similar or different if they were Angel based life forms? How would these alien races react to the situation on earth (SI, EVAs etc?) Would they help or mock us from a far? Would the other Angel life forms act the same as the ones on earth, or would they be less aggressive to us? [/spoiler]

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 20, 2013 4:30 pm Thats basically just a great big shrug. We don't have any way of knowing what sort of life these others would create or what kind of fruits they bear... possibly 5 completely new types we can't even begin to speculate about. Also keep in mind that's info only revealed in one of the games, so it's canonicity is debatable.
